{{Quote|I don't believe you've met my pet vornskyrs, Councilor. This one's named Drang; the somewhat more aloof one there is Sturm.|Talon Karrde|<ref name="The Last Command">''[[The Last Command]]''</ref>}}
'''Sturm''', along with [[Drang]], was one of [[Talon Karrde]]'s two pet [[vornskr]]s.

Karrde met Sturm when the vornskr attacked him. The smuggler shot its tail off in self-defense, which injured and stunned the beast, stopping its attack. Karrde nursed it back to health and the two took a liking to one another. This was partly since tailless vornskrs lack the hunting aggression of their wild counterparts, thus Sturm was content with being fed by Karrde. 

Karrde considered Sturm, to be "slightly more aloof" in personality than Drang. 

Around [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]] Karrde brought them to [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|Mount Tantiss]] in hoping that they could locate [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] using their Force-related hunting technique.

{{Creature-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The name, along with Drang, was a reference to [[Wikipedia:Sturm und Drang|''Sturm und Drang'']], an eighteenth-century German literary movement emphasizing struggles of the individual against society, something which author [[Timothy Zahn]] felt would appeal to Karrde as an educated, pun-loving sort.<ref name="Heir 20">''[[Heir to the Empire: The 20th Anniversary Edition]]''</ref>
